channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘Disclosure Day’ or Not, UFO Movies Never Left
item.description: Seems likely that 'Disclosure Day' is going to hit big, so Hollywood's looking to let UFO stories into its heart (and wallet).

item.title: Ce chargeur SUPERVOOC 80W deux ports à moins de 30 € par OnePlus représente un gain de temps considérable
item.description: Si vous cherchez un chargeur mural efficace pour votre smartphone ou votre PC, ce modèle SUPERVOOC 80W à 29,99 euros au lieu de 49,99 euros sur OnePlus n'attend que vous.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs PC ultraportables en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d’un ordinateur portable à la fois léger, compact et performant ? Les ultraportables, aussi appelés "ultrabooks", sont faits pour vous. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs modèles, soigneusement testés par l’équipe de Frandroid.

item.title: Sony appears to be testing dynamic pricing on PlayStation games
item.description: A site called PSprices has been tracking prices on Sony's digital game store and noticed something unusual: some games were being offered at different prices to different users. What's more, those offers are tracked in the PlayStation API with experiment identifiers like IPT_PILOT and IPT_OPR_TESTING. Dynamic pricing is nothing new and is used across a […]...

item.title: Indonesia announces a social media ban for anyone under 16
item.description: Following in the footsteps of Australia, Indonesia will be the latest country to limit social media usage for children under 16. Meutya Hafid, Indonesia's communication and digital affairs minister, announced that a new government regulation will require "high-risk" platforms to delete any accounts from Indonesia that are under 16, starting on March 28. Hafid said in the announcement that the implementation would be done in stages, starting with major platforms like YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, Threads, X, Roblox and Bigo Live, a live-streaming platform based in Singapore. The ministe...

item.title: OpenAI delays ChatGPT’s ‘adult mode’ again
item.description: The feature, which will give verified adult users access to erotica and other adult content, had already been delayed from December.

item.title: Compal's latest laptop concept adds a color E-Ink display that piques my curiosity — but I am not sure it will turn into a real product because of one flaw
item.description: Compal’s AI Book concept replaces the palm rest with a color E-Ink touchscreen that remains visible when the lid is closed, raising durability concerns.

item.title: J’ai couru 70 km avec une montre outdoor solide, massive et ultra endurante : mon test de l’Amazfit T-Rex Ultra 2
item.description: Après sa T-Rex 3 Pro, Amazfit a lancé un modèle de montre outdoor encore plus endurant, sa nouvelle Amazfit T-Rex Ultra 2, annoncée avec un mois d'autonomie. Voici son test complet.

item.title: Time’s running out to get a free gift card when you preorder a new MacBook
item.description: This has been a week to remember here at The Verge. MWC 2026 in Barcelona lead straight into Apple’s week of product announcements. There was truly something for everyone, whether you’ve been wanting a company to make a phone that can start fires, or had your fingers crossed for a brand-new MacBook model that costs […]

item.title: Celebrate the Many Sides of Asuka in This 30th Anniversary ‘Evangelion’ Short
item.description: Asuka Langley Soryu (or Shikinami Langley if you're Rebuilding), you will get a better ending in 'Evangelion' someday.

item.title: Très bon prix pour ce casque JBL Tour One M2 qui perd 130 € avec son autonomie monstrueuse et beaucoup de punch
item.description: Le JBL Tour One M2 est un casque Bluetooth à l'autonomie XL de 50h sans ANC et des graves JBL bien prononcés à retrouver en promo pour 199,99 euros sur Cultura, au lieu de 329,99 euros à son lancement.
